title: Allow Viewers to Click on Items in the Dashboard Calendar View to View Additional Detail
excerpt: Since we cannot export/share the calendar view without members of our team needing to create their own account and be marked as viewers, we need the ability for those with View Only access to be able to click on items sh…

posts.author: cdf (Carrie d.)
posts.cookedHtml: Since we cannot export/share the calendar view without members of our team needing to create their own account and be marked as viewers, we need the ability for those with View Only access to be able to click on items shown on the Dashboard Calendar View to see the additional details that are captured on the boards where the data was entered. It’s not feasible for them to be clicking back and forth between the boards and the Dashboard, and would be helpful if they could click on the item to still have view only access of the additional detail (especially since you cannot turn off the weekend view, and the space allowed for Mon-Fri condenses the text in the item titles so much).

posts.author: comunicacaofundiagua (Comunicação Fundiágua)
posts.cookedHtml: That will be very helpful, since I want to display other informations like fields dedicated to areas, links…) . As the only field available today is the task name its very restrict to the visitors who acess the calendar shared view to know more details about the task.
